description_long: This is a simple, round stool with a padded seat upholstered in a muted green fabric. The seat is supported by three sturdy, slightly tapered wooden legs that are evenly spaced for stability. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish, giving the stool a natural and inviting appearance. The fabric on the seat has a subtle woven texture, adding a touch of softness and comfort. There are no visible decorative elements, backrest, or footrest, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The stool is compact and lightweight, suitable for use in public spaces such as cafes, waiting areas, or parks.
description: A round, green-upholstered stool with three wooden legs and a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round green seat and two of the three wooden legs.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still highlighting the seat and the arrangement of the legs.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to the previous, with the seat and legs visible.
description_view_3: Final rotated view, showing the same features from a slightly different angle.
